name: Dark Lucius LV4
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>漆黒の魔王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダーク・ルシアス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レベル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>４
desc: Negate the effects of your opponent's monsters destroyed by battle with this card. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of your next turn after this card has destroyed a monster by battle: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dark Lucius LV6" from your hand or Deck.
mnst_eff: Negate the effects of your opponent's monsters destroyed by battle with this card. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of your next turn after this card has destroyed a monster by battle: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dark Lucius LV6" from your hand or Deck.
eff: Negate the effects of your opponent's monsters destroyed by battle with this card. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase of your next turn after this card has destroyed a monster by battle: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dark Lucius LV6" from your hand or Deck.

sets.set: Speed Duel Starter Decks: Twisted Nightmares

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
